meaning: n.特洛伊,[史]特洛伊(小亚细亚西北部古城),金衡制
examples: Troy finally fell to the Greeks.
Troy was very wise for his age and had already figured out ways to outsmart her.
The Greeks coming to Troy needed a port to anchor their ships.
Piper Jaffray analyst Troy Jensen this morning likewise repeated his bullish stance on the sector.
Troy introduced me to a few people, and those people introduced me to a few people.
